prompt:
Editorial vertical poster, 4:5 aspect ratio, 1080x1350px. Solid forest-green background hex #1C3F3A. Premium magazine-grade typography, minimal composition, generous negative space. Layout has 5% padding on all edges.

TOP ZONE (centered horizontally, ~10% from top): Small badge text in DM Sans Regular 400 uppercase, letter-spacing +0.08em, color hex #C89136 gold, ~22px: 'FAIXA FUNCIONAL · 03'

BIOMARKER NAME ZONE (~24% from top, aligned center-left with 8% indent): Large title in DM Sans Regular 400 uppercase, letter-spacing +0.04em, color hex #f8fffc off-white, ~38px: 'GLICOSE PÓS-PRANDIAL'. Directly below, smaller subtitle in DM Sans Regular 400, ~16px, color hex #557D6D sage: 'medida 2 horas após a refeição'

CENTRAL TABLE ZONE (between 30% and 72% of height): TWO COLUMNS side by side, separated by a thin 1px vertical line in color hex #557D6D sage that runs the full height of this zone.

LEFT COLUMN (centered text):
- Top label, DM Sans Regular 400 uppercase, letter-spacing +0.06em, ~16px, color hex #f8fffc at 70% opacity: 'FAIXA LABORATÓRIO'
- Huge anchor number, DM Sans Light 300, ~160px, color hex #C89136 gold: '< 140'
- Unit below, DM Sans Regular 400, ~22px, color hex #f8fffc: 'mg/dL'
- Small caption below, Georgia Italic, ~14px, color hex #557D6D sage: 'referência ADA'

RIGHT COLUMN (centered text):
- Top label, DM Sans Regular 400 uppercase, letter-spacing +0.06em, ~16px, color hex #C89136 gold: 'FAIXA FUNCIONAL'
- Huge anchor number, DM Sans Light 300, ~160px, color hex #C89136 gold: '< 120'
- Unit below, DM Sans Regular 400, ~22px, color hex #f8fffc: 'mg/dL'
- Small caption below, Georgia Italic, ~14px, color hex #557D6D sage: 'Longevify'

FOOTER EDITORIAL ZONE (between 72% and 88% of height): Two lines of Georgia Italic, ~20px, color hex #f8fffc, centered, line-height 1.4:
'A diferença entre as faixas não é estatística.'
'É o intervalo silencioso onde a glicação acontece.'

BOTTOM ZONE (between 88% and 100%): RESERVE empty space centered horizontally for a wordmark logo to be overlaid in post-process. Do not render any logo text or glyph in this area. Keep it clean, blank forest-green background with 5% bottom padding.

All Portuguese accents rendered correctly (ó, ã, ç, é). All text crisp, perfectly aligned, no extra decoration, no icons, no illustrations, no photos, no graphic flourishes.

ABSOLUTELY NO: test tubes, lab equipment, syringes, blood drops, molecules, DNA helixes, charts, graphs, gradients, drop shadows, emoji, hashtags, decorative borders, watermarks, fake logos, stock-photo imagery, persona portraits, human figures, hands, food photography, plate of food, glucose meters.
notes: FAIXA FUNCIONAL · 03 — glicose pós-prandial. Logo overlay (longevify-horizontal-white.png at 28% width, bottom-center, 5% padding) applied in post-process.
